# SecKeychainStatus

**Type Alias**

A value that defines the current status of a keychain.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias SecKeychainStatus = UInt32
```

## Discussion

Use the values defined in [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecKeychainStatus-values].
